message:
fix(robot): correct glob pattern matching in synthesis.go matchesPattern

Updated the matchesPattern function to properly handle:
1. Multiple * patterns (e.g., src/*/test/*.go) - now checks all parts
   appear in order instead of using filepath.Match which doesn't
   handle these correctly
2. ** patterns with suffixes (e.g., src/**/test.go) - now properly
   verifies both prefix and suffix match

This brings the robot/synthesis.go implementation in line with the
fixed coordinator/conflicts.go implementation.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
